productDisplayName: Enamor Women Blue Boy-Shorts Bikini Brief
description: Blue  briefs for women made of cotton/Lycra fabric, has an elastic waistband, regular rise styling and printed label on the inner FitMid  rise Wash care Machine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron Tumble dry low This pair of boy shorts briefs from enamor is crafted using premium cotton fabric that provides quick dry breathability and no visible panty line. The cut allows free leg movement, the fashion elastic with cushioning enhances a luxurious feel and look, the no pinch elastic and printed label on the inside both provide irritation-free comfort.
